question: Create `mitre-att-ck_concepts.txt` and explain how the concept 'MITRE ATT&CK' applies to this topic.
hint: Write at least two lines and include the concept name explicitly.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
[ -f mitre-att-ck_concepts.txt ] || exit 1
grep -qi "MITRE ATT&CK" mitre-att-ck_concepts.txt || exit 1
[ $(wc -l < mitre-att-ck_concepts.txt) -ge 2 ] || exit 1
exit 0

question: Create `mitre-att-ck_checklist_2.md` with at least three checklist items describing practical verification steps for topic 'MITRE ATT&CK'.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
[ -f mitre-att-ck_checklist_2.md ] || exit 1
grep -Ec '^- \[ \]' mitre-att-ck_checklist_2.md | awk '{exit ($1>=3)?0:1}'
exit 0
